The Sun presides over the eastern half of the Narmada dis-
trict, the Sone, Orissa, VaAga, Suhma, KaliAga, Balkh, Sakas
(Scythians), Yavanas, Magadha, Sabaras, Pragjyotisa, Cma,
Kamboja, Mekala, Kiratas, Vitakas, people in and outside moun-
tains, Pulindas, eastern half of the Dravida country, the south bank
of the Yamuna, Campa, Udumbara, Kausambl town, Gedi, Vindh-
ya forest, Kaliiiga, Pundra, GolaAgulas, Snparvata, Burdwan, river
Iksumatl, robbers (or the country of the robbers), Paratas, wilder-
